events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the oversized lifts (~16-18 in loose vs. the ~6-8 in max typical for plate/tamper compactors under project specs and IPC 306) prevent full-depth compaction, so this is judged a **fail** with **high risk** (under-compacted bedding risks future settlement and pipe deflection). Corrective action is to remove/respread in compliant lift thickness, recompact, and verify with density testing before proceeding.
